user.title: Kilowahti — Basic settings
user.description: Region determines which Nordic/Baltic spot-price area is used.

data_description.name: Used in entity names, e.g. 'Home'
data_description.price_resolution: 15 minutes (96 slots/day) or 1 hour (24 slots/day). Match your contract's metering interval.

vat_and_tax.title: VAT & electricity tax
vat_and_tax.description: Pre-filled from your region. Adjust if needed. All prices (transfer tiers, fixed periods) are entered incl. VAT.

data_description.electricity_tax: Flat per-kWh electricity tax added on top of spot/fixed price.

transfer_groups.title: Transfer pricing
transfer_groups.description: Organise transfer price tiers into named groups (e.g. Time-of-use, Seasonal, General). Only one group is active at a time. You can skip this and configure groups later in Options.

transfer_group_detail.title: Edit group
transfer_group_detail.description: Add or remove tiers, or set this group as active.

add_transfer_tier.title: Add transfer price
add_transfer_tier.description: Evaluated in priority order; first match wins. Add a base rate as the lowest priority with no time constraints.

data_description.max_price: When the current slot's price is at or below this, the price_acceptable sensor turns on.
data_description.price_threshold_includes_transfer: ON: compare total price (spot + transfer). OFF: compare energy price only (spot).
data_description.max_rank: When the current slot's rank is at or below this, the rank_acceptable sensor turns on.
data_description.forward_avg_hours: Number of hours ahead to average for the next_hours_avg sensor.
data_description.control_factor_function: Shape of the 0–1 control factor curve.
data_description.control_factor_scaling: Exponent applied to control factor (amplifies extremes).

score_profiles.title: Optimization scores
score_profiles.description: Scores measure how well your consumption is shifted to cheap hours. The permanent 'Total' profile covers all consumption — link a meter (or meters) to it in Options after setup.

sensor_display.title: Sensor display
sensor_display.description: Configure how sensor values are displayed in Home Assistant.

data.expose_price_arrays: Expose price arrays as sensor attributes (increases DB size)

data_description.expose_price_arrays: Writes today_prices and tomorrow_prices arrays to the spot_price sensor attributes, which are then stored in the database. Makes dashboard graphs easier to build, but is not required for displaying them and adds unnecessary DB load.
data_description.high_precision: When on, price sensors display more decimals. Attributes and calculations always use full precision.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect. Check your network.
error.invalid_region: The selected region returned no data from the API.
error.tier_hour_range: End time must be greater than start time.
error.period_invalid_dates: End date must be on or after start date.
error.period_overlap: This period overlaps with an existing fixed-price period.
error.period_price_zero: Price must be greater than zero.

basic.title: Basic settings
basic.description: Warning: changing the display unit after sensors have been created will cause unit mismatches in history graphs. You may need to clear sensor history or adjust dashboard cards manually.

data.expose_price_arrays: Expose price arrays as sensor attributes (increases DB size)

fixed_periods.title: Fixed-price periods / fixed contracts
fixed_periods.description: Manage fixed-price periods or fixed contracts. When active, effective_price shows the set fixed price instead of spot.

data_description.price: Enter price incl. VAT. This price is used as-is — no VAT is added.

error.tier_hour_range: End time must be greater than start time.
error.period_invalid_dates: End date must be on or after start date.
error.period_overlap: This period overlaps with an existing fixed-price period.
error.period_price_zero: Price must be greater than zero.
